title: Alex's Caves X Woodworks/FD
description: A Resource pack for Every Compat that adds unique textures for the Alex's Caves x Woodworks/FD Compat.
body:
A Simple Resource pack for [Every Compat (Wood Good)](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat) that adds Unique Textures for [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) X [Woodworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodworks)/[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) Compat.

Ive also made a Datapack that replaces the Chests/Ladders in the Cavemen Houses/Forlorn Huts with their respective wood types [Here!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/alexs-caves-x-woodworks-compat-datapack)

**Currently No plans to support any other mods.**
